delay_custom_prompt:
{e_edit} Enter a custom delay in hours.
Examples: • 0.5 → 30 minutes • 12 → 12 hours • 72 → 3 days
delay_invalid: {e_warning} Please enter a number ≥ 0 (e.g. 24 for 24 hours, 0.5 for 30 minutes).
delay_picker_title_msg:
{e_kw_cooldown} When should this step be sent?

Choose how long after the previous step (or after enrollment for the first step). Tap a preset or enter a custom delay.

{e_light_bulb} Use Immediately for a welcome message, then longer delays for follow-ups.
delete_confirm_body: <tg-spoiler>This will also cancel {active} active enrollment(s) and remove all steps. This cannot be undone.</tg-spoiler>
empty:
No sequences yet. A drip sequence delivers messages automatically over time — perfect for onboarding new subscribers, running a course, or following up after a form submission.
Where you can trigger a sequence: • Button action — add an Enroll in Sequence button to any menu • Keyword trigger — enroll subscribers automatically when they send a specific word • Conditions — start a sequence when a subscriber meets a rule (e.g. tag = vip) • Toggle — flip enrollment on or off based on subscriber state {e_light_bulb} Sequences run in the background — once enrolled, subscribers receive each step at the delay you set, even if they never interact again.
limit_reached: {e_warning} Your plan allows up to {max} sequences. Upgrade for more.
no_sequences_yet: No sequences yet — create one first
no_sequences_yet_btn: No sequences yet — create one first
no_steps: No steps yet. Tap Add Step below to add the first message. Each step has a delay (how long after the previous step) and content (text, photo, video, or a menu).
prompt_content_msg: Send the message content for this step.
prompt_name_msg: Enter a name for this sequence.
prompt_step_menu_select_msg:
{e_menu} Select a Menu

Choose which menu to display at this step. The subscriber will see the menu's message and buttons when this step is delivered.
step_limit_toast: 🔒 Max {max} steps on your plan. Upgrade for more.
subtitle: Automatically send a series of messages to subscribers on a schedule you define.
title: {e_sequence} Message Sequences
upgrade_required:
{e_sequence} Message Sequences Drip sequences let you automatically send a series of messages to subscribers on a schedule — perfect for onboarding, courses, and follow-up campaigns.
This feature requires the Advanced plan. Advanced unlocks up to 20 sequences with 10 steps each, and seamless integration with keyword triggers, button actions, and conditions.
